{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193603F67A8E232C435BE26DB1"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7617046786407187225","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后面世界杯，我觉得可以搞一个季军。要季军就是要4进2的那一把。可以搞一个二二年的姆巴佩帽子戏法难救主流量面子都有了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773485760,"group_id":"7609896558758218777","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"422628062415501"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609896558758218777","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"60"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7212,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7617049989700797209","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺好，主角的属性可以多给一点。因为足球是11人的游戏，哪怕几乎都给点满也不可能每一把都赢。就像巅峰时期的C罗和梅西在我们看来几乎都是接近满分的属性，也不可能每一把都进一球。不要太限制属性，因为他哪怕全部都是100点，也不可能每一把都进一个。除非他有一个射门必进。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773485524,"group_id":"7609896558758218777","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"1111111111","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2CEkwVYpkTSwB3DdTzZUBQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"422628062415501","user_name":"爱吃南京桂花鸭的瞿智"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"422628062415501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609896558758218777","book_info":{"abstract":"【世界杯】+【红魔复兴】+【搞笑】+【边路即艺术】+【创造爆炸】
　　足球大舞台，有活你就来！
　　林羽穿越英超，入驻急需复兴的红魔曼联。
　　重建之路困难重重。
　　可林羽觉醒绝对球感，以天才之名，意气风发！
　　很快，林羽成为了众多传奇口中最特殊的那一个。
　　小罗：“论球感，林羽第一，我排第10086！”
　　菲戈：“梦幻舞步，边路即艺术！”
　　德尚：“我们没有输给挪威队，我们只是输给了林羽！”
　　蒂特：“众神巴西队本可以六夺大力神杯，可林羽杀穿了世界杯！”
　　最中立的曼联解说王楚琪：“林羽率领曼联，大胜狂胜全胜！”
　　“连打狂打一直打！”
　　“先斩天下第二，再斩天下第一！”
　　”重返陆地神仙之境！”
　　“当今足坛。”
　　“得林羽者，得天下！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a4531154c96433d7b10d7b3d914474ac~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"年少阿奎","author_id":"","book_id":"7609896558758218777","book_name":"那年十七，我入挪威队杀穿世界杯","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609896903345439257","read_count":"27868","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"154616"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"67","tags":"游戏体育,体育,穿越,系统,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a4531154c96433d7b10d7b3d914474ac~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363363&x-signature=uKrEnnkgDH7YaNKIJtK3v6l9zhM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102514383834","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"59"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193603F67A8E232C435BE26DB1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7198,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":793},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_ti
